title: helianthemum arcticum
intro: Helianthemum arcticum, also known as rockrose or alpine rose, is a flowering plant species native to the Arctic tundra regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum arcticum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or taken internally to support overall well-being.
